ogTitle: Chilcotts Creek vs Chilcotts Grass: Climate Safety

heading: Chilcotts Creek vs Chilcotts Grass — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chilcotts Creek, New South Wales and Chilcotts Grass, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chilcotts Grass has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Chilcotts Creek (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chilcotts Creek or Chilcotts Grass safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chilcotts Creek has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Chilcotts Grass scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chilcotts Creek scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Chilcotts Grass scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chilcotts Creek or Chilcotts Grass?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chilcotts Grass has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
